outline: Venn diagrams (up to 3 sets) & word problems

modules.title: Module 1 · Basic Ideas & Notation
modules.html:
A set is a well-defined collection of distinct objects called its elements. We use capital letters for sets: $A,B,U$ etc.

  • $x\in A$: '$x$ belongs to $A$'.
  • $x\notin A$: '$x$ does not belong to $A$'.
  • $\emptyset$ or $\{\}$: the empty set.
  • $U$: the universal set.
  • $n(A)$: the number of elements in $A$.

Types: finite, infinite, equal, equivalent, subset ($A\subseteq B$), proper subset ($A\subset B$), power set.

modules.title: Module 2 · Union, Intersection, Complement
modules.html:
$A\cup B$ is the set of elements in $A$ or $B$ (or both). $A\cap B$ is the set of elements in both. $A'$ (or $A^c$) is the complement of $A$ w.r.t. $U$: elements in $U$ not in $A$.

$$n(A\cup B) = n(A) + n(B) - n(A\cap B)$$

modules.title: Module 3 · Venn Diagrams & Word Problems
modules.html:
For three overlapping sets:

$$n(A\cup B\cup C)=n(A)+n(B)+n(C)-n(A\cap B)-n(A\cap C)-n(B\cap C)+n(A\cap B\cap C)$$

Word-problem strategy: draw the Venn diagram, start with the innermost region ($A\cap B\cap C$), then move outward, filling each region using the given data.

examples.q: In a class of 40, 22 like Maths, 18 like English, 8 like both. How many like neither?
examples.a: Like at least one: $22+18-8=32$. Like neither: $40-32=8$.

How many subsets does a set of $4$ elements have?
quiz.solution: A set with $n$ elements has $2^n$ subsets. Here $2^{4} = 16$.

quiz.q: How many subsets does a set of $4$ elements have?
quiz.solution: A set with $n$ elements has $2^n$ subsets. Here $2^{4} = 16$.

quiz.q: How many subsets does a set of $3$ elements have?

quiz.q: If $A = \{a,b\}$ and $B = \{b,c\}$, find $A \cup B$.
quiz.solution: Union = all distinct elements from either set.

quiz.q: If $A \subseteq B$ and $B \subseteq A$, then...
quiz.solution: Mutual inclusion means the two sets are equal.

quiz.q: If $A = \{a,b\}$ and $B = \{b,c\}$, find $A \cup B$.
quiz.solution: Union = all distinct elements from either set.

quiz.q: If $A = \{a,b\}$ and $B = \{b,c\}$, find $A \cup B$.
quiz.solution: Union = all distinct elements from either set.

quiz.q: The set of all elements in $U$ not in $A$ is called...
Which symbol denotes the empty set?
quiz.solution: The empty set contains no elements; it is denoted $\emptyset$ or $\{\}$.

quiz.q: If $A = \{a,b\}$ and $B = \{b,c\}$, find $A \cup B$.
quiz.solution: Union = all distinct elements from either set.

quiz.q: Which symbol denotes the empty set?
quiz.solution: The empty set contains no elements; it is denoted $\emptyset$ or $\{\}$.
